UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific settings and branding information.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

niche.description: The content niche of the user's channel.

description.description: A description of the user's channel.

brandingStyle.description: The visual branding style of the channel.

clonedVoice.description: The name of the cloned voice used for TTS.

clonedLikeness.description: Array of base64 images representing the user's likeness.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

VideoContent.title: Video Content
VideoContent.description: Represents a video project, including scripts, thumbnails, and status.

id.description: The unique identifier of the video project.

script.description: The generated script for the video.

tags.description: List of tags for the video.

storyboard.description: The visual storyboard for the video.

videoUrl.description: URL to the generated video clip.

platforms.description: Platforms the video is intended for.

status.description: The current status of the project.

PlatformCaption.title: Platform Caption
PlatformCaption.description: A caption tailored for a specific social platform.

/users/{uid}.description: User profile documents stored by UID.

/users/{uid}/videos/{videoId}.description: Video projects belonging to a specific user.
